Installs necessary dependencies for building and analyzing the project using apt-get.

# Purpose
This script is a Bash executable file intended for setting up a development environment. It updates the package list on a Debian-based system and installs several development tools and dependencies. The tools include `make`, `cmake`, `gcc`, `cppcheck`, `vera++`, and `python`. The script uses `sudo` to ensure that it has the necessary permissions to install these packages. This setup is essential for building and analyzing software projects that require these specific tools.
